Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. JAMES P. NEVIN OF THE LAW FIRM OF BRAYTON & PURCELL, LLP, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROSEANNA M. CASTILLO OF THE K & L GATES, TEL. NO. 882-8072 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CRANE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CRANE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS AND MR. AY'S DECLARATIONS, THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =301/PJB
